text:
is a series of books focused on the animation of Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series and Evangelion: Death and Rebirth and The End of Evangelion films.

Overview

Each book features the set of definitive storyboards used for the production of the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series. The storyboards are presented in their original format: a four-column grid showing the scene number, a transcription of the sound effects, a sketch describing the scene and the transcription of the dialogue synchronized with the corresponding scene. The books are sold in a transparent plastic case.
